summary: Excellent Charlie Miller soundboard captures a beautiful, jam‑heavy show with standout Sunrise and Brown Eyed Women performances.
review: The recording is a crisp, high‑fidelity soundboard cut from Charlie Miller that fans praise for its clarity. Musically the concert shines in spots – Jerry’s exploratory guitar work, a spacey Dancin > drums > Jam segment, and strong renditions of Sunrise and Brown Eyed Women – though a few reviewers feel it doesn’t quite eclipse the two shows surrounding it.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are uniformly positive about both performance and recording; weighted scoring (70 % show, 30 % tape) yields a solid 4.3‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced soundboard capture from Charlie Miller; no listeners reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows through beautiful moments and adventurous jams; some fans note it isn’t quite as strong as the two surrounding shows but still delivers a satisfying experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Locked‑in, exploratory guitar playing highlighted during the jam.
band_member_comments.Phil: Prominent bass presence – ‘phil all over his 4 string’ noted by reviewers.
band_member_comments.Drums: Energetic drumming praised in the Dancin > drums > Jam section.
